title: Abonshee
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Abonshee
(locally, Masterhome) |region=[[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} |sector=[[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]] |system=[[Abonshee system/Legends|Abonshee system]] |coordinates=K-9 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial{{WEGCite|story=Tests of the Godking|book=Star Wars Campaign Pack}} |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest=[[Godking's castle]] |flora= |fauna=*[[Eater]] *[[Griff (creature)|Griff]] *[[Likka]] |otherlife= |species=[[Anointed People]] |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government=[[Godking]] |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] }} '''Abonshee'''—literally, '''Masterhome'''—was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Abonshee system/Legends|Abonshee system]] of [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]] in the [[Bakchou arm]]. It was a temperate world with hardy flora and reptilian fauna. It was home to the reptilian [[Anointed People]], and was located in the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]]. The name "Masterhome" was given by the Anointed People. Abonshee was discovered by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] some ninety years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. ==Description== Abonshee was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with a breathable [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. The northern continent had a temperate climate and ecology that was comfortable by [[Human/Legends|Human]] standards. The world was inhabited by the native [[Anointed People]], bipedal [[Lizard/Legends|lizard]]-like [[Species/Legends|species]] who were organized in to a feudal caste society led by the [[Godking]]. The planet's largest [[City/Legends|city]] was located on the northern continent, sprawling over six [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]]. The [[Godking's castle]] stood at the center, surrounded by one and two-storey [[Wood/Legends|wood]] and [[Stone/Legends|stone]] buildings. Around twenty thousand Anointed People lived in the city. Hundreds of kilometers of woodland surrounded the city, with [[Farm/Legends|farms]], towns, and [[Castle/Legends|castles]] dotted around the landscape in clearings. The [[Forest/Legends|forests]] teemed with animal life and were full of [[Tree/Legends|trees]], open meadows, and babbling brooks. Small towns were situated around either a well or a crossroads, and usually in sight of a local castle. Wooden buildings dominated the towns with the villagers being engaged in work such as farming, tanning, and blacksmithing. Small walled castles were ruled by the local [[Noble/Legends|nobility]], the [[Godling]]s. ==History== A [[Scout/Legends|scouting]] expedition discovered Abonshee around [[90 BBY/Legends|90 BBY]], and reported that the native species were warlike and hostile. Under the rule of Godking [[Trisstan]], Abonshee and the Anointed People entered a forty-[[Standard year/Legends|year]] golden age of peace and prosperity. Ignored by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Abonshee was selected by [[Reekeene's Roughnecks]] as the target of a diplomatic mission from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] to gain the Anointed People's support. {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{WEGCite|story=Tests of the Godking|book=Star Wars Campaign Pack|reprint=1}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Campaign Pack]]'' {{ID|Masterhome}} *[[Star Wars Miniatures Battles (first edition)|''Star Wars Miniatures Battles'', First Edition]] {{ID|Masterhome}} *[[Star Wars Miniatures Battles (Second Edition)|''Star Wars Miniatures Battles'', Second Edition]] {{ID|Masterhome}} *''[[Alien Encounters]]'' {{1stID|Abonshee}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Abonshee }} [[Category:Fakir sector locations]] [[Category:Planets in the Colonies]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Abonshee locations]] }}
